message:
fix: deduplicate tool names sent to Anthropic API

Two bugs caused duplicate tool names in the tools array:

1. web_search function tool was registered for all providers but is
   only needed as a Gemini shim (OpenAI/Anthropic handle web search
   natively). For Anthropic, this collided with the adapter-injected
   server-side web_search tool, causing "Tool names must be unique."

2. rebuildToolDefsCache tracked profile tools by canonical name only,
   not by provider-mapped name. When OpenAI mapped glob→list_dir,
   the registry's separate list_dir tool passed the dedup check.

Fix: conditionally register web_search for Gemini only, and track
both canonical and provider-mapped names in the included set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
